creator: m.jedrasik@gmail.com
text:
Hi,

This bug is still there (for CLAMAV). It still fails to build properly
WITH_CLAMAV, throwing off a linker error.

ftp/proftpd-devel port WITH_CLAMAV builds just fine.

I've read there are some options aparently available, but with updated
ports tree when I issue make config in /usr/ports/ftp/proftpd I see no info
about CLAMAV or any other options which are available in proftpd-devel.

proftpd-devel is older than proftpd, version wise and seems to shut itself
down randomly hence my will to try out ftp/proftpd instead.

--

logic ends, when humanity begins.
m.jedrasik@gmail.com
